title: Savory Dense Cozy Swede Stir-fry
description: A savory and dense swede dish cooked in a cozy way with Jain-friendly ingredients that can be served as a side or light meal.

ingredients.name: Swede
ingredients.notes: Optional to add a small amount of oil for cooking.

instructions: Chop the swede, onion, and garlic into small pieces.
Heat a small amount of oil in a pressure cooker over medium heat.
Add the chopped onions to the pot, cook until translucent (about 2 minutes).
Next, add the cloves of garlic, turmeric powder, and salt. Stir well for about 30 seconds.
Pour in the vegetable stock and tomato puree, stir again, then cover with the pressure cooker lid.
Close the valve to lock the steam chamber in place. Use medium-high heat until it reaches high pressure (about 15 minutes).
Once reached, allow natural release for about 10-12 minutes before releasing all remaining pressure manually and allowing any residual steam to escape.
Serve hot with your choice of bread or as a side dish.
